typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		TCOOPE as string,
		DRD as string,
		Server_WFGUID as string,
		SourceID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FoundFile	source(output(
		ID as integer,
		DRDJiraNumber as string,
		TCOOPEJiraNumber as string,
		Device_WFGUID as string,
		SourceID as string,
		SourceFileName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dbo.tbl_TCOOPE_DRD_Server_QID_Mapping',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupLKPTABLE
FoundFile derive(DRDJiraNumber = $User__sFileName,
		import_dt = toDate(toString(currentDate(), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy")) ~> FileNameJiraNumber
FileNameJiraNumber,LookupLKPTABLE lookup(DRD == LookupLKPTABLE@DRDJiraNumber && FoundFile@SourceID == LookupLKPTABLE@SourceID && TCOOPE == TCOOPEJiraNumber && Server_WFGUID == Device_WFGUID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookup
Lookup select(mapColumn(
		DRDJiraNumber = FileNameJiraNumber@DRDJiraNumber,
		import_dt = import_dt,
		TCOOPE = TCOOPE,
		DRD = DRD,
		Server_WFGUID = Server_WFGUID,
		SourceID = FoundFile@SourceID,
		ID = ID,
		TCOOPEJiraNumber = TCOOPEJiraNumber,
		Device_WFGUID = Device_WFGUID,
		SourceFileName = SourceFileName
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupSelect
LookupSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupIsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
		TCOOPEJiraNumber as string,
		SourceFileName as string,
		SourceID as string,
		Device_WFGUID as string,
		DRDJiraNumber as string,
		Import_dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		TCOOPEJiraNumber = TCOOPE,
		SourceFileName = DRDJiraNumber,
		SourceID,
		Device_WFGUID = Server_WFGUID,
		DRDJiraNumber = DRD,
		Import_dt = import_dt)) ~> OLEDBDestination
